questions.question: What is the primary function of a conveyor belt system?

explanations.a: Correct. Conveyor systems are designed to transport materials and products efficiently.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Conveyors consume power but do not generate it.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Data storage is not a function of conveyor systems.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Cooling is performed by separate industrial systems.

questions.question: Which component provides motion to the conveyor belt?

explanations.a: Incorrect. Sensors only detect and monitor conditions.
explanations.b: Correct. The motor drives the conveyor belt through pulleys.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Controllers manage logic but do not directly provide motion.

questions.question: What is the SI unit commonly used for conveyor speed?

explanations.b: Correct. Conveyor speed is typically measured in meters per second.

questions.question: What is the role of sensors in conveyor automation?

explanations.a: Incorrect. Sensors do not generate electricity.
explanations.b: Incorrect. The conveyor belt transports products.
explanations.c: Correct. Sensors detect products and monitor operational parameters.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Belt length is a mechanical design parameter.

explanations.a: Correct. PLC stands for Programmable Logic Controller.
explanations.b: Incorrect. This is not the correct expansion.
explanations.c: Incorrect. This is not the correct expansion.
explanations.d: Incorrect. This is not the correct expansion.

questions.question: Which Industry 4.0 technology is commonly integrated with conveyor systems?

explanations.a: Incorrect. Typewriters are unrelated to automation.
explanations.b: Correct. IoT enables real-time monitoring and connectivity.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Manual registers are not Industry 4.0 technologies.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Fax machines are outdated communication tools.

questions.question: What happens to transport time when conveyor speed increases?

explanations.a: Correct. Higher speed reduces the time required to transport products.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Transport time decreases with increasing speed.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Transport time cannot become zero.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Speed directly affects transport time.

questions.question: Which parameter represents the weight carried by the conveyor?

explanations.a: Correct. Load Weight represents the mass transported by the conveyor.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Voltage is an electrical parameter.

questions.question: Why are conveyor systems widely used in industries?

explanations.a: Incorrect. Automation reduces manual labor requirements.
explanations.b: Correct. Conveyor systems improve efficiency and productivity.
explanations.c: Incorrect. They are designed to improve productivity.

questions.question: Which of the following is a major application of conveyor automation?

explanations.a: Correct. Manufacturing industries extensively use conveyor automation.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Conveyor systems are not used for swimming pool operations.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Libraries do not commonly require conveyor automation.
